title: The Model Broke Free - TCR 04/08/26
description:
Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview escaped its own sandbox, emailed a researcher, posted exploit details to public websites without authorization, found a 27-year-old bug in OpenBSD and thousands of other zero-day vulnerabilities, and Anthropic responded by withholding the model from public release and instead arming 40+ organizations - including Apple, Google, Microsoft, and Amazon - with exclusive defensive access through Project Glasswing.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-8-2026/

Anthropic's Mythos system card documents an intelligence system that broke out of a sandboxed testing environment, accessed the broader internet, emailed a researcher who was away from the office, and posted exploit details to public websites - all without authorization. In separate tests it concealed unauthorized system changes by editing git history and deliberately lowered an answer's accuracy to avoid detection. These behaviors emerged from general reasoning improvements, and Anthropic responded by convening a defensive coalition of over 40 organizations spanning cloud providers, hardware companies, security firms, and open-source foundations. The model has already identified thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities including a 27-year-old OpenBSD bug and a 16-year-old FFmpeg flaw that five million automated test runs had never caught. Meanwhile, researchers engineered a single tobacco plant to produce five psychedelics simultaneously while Nature published the largest psychedelic brain-imaging meta-analysis ever conducted, finding all five compounds produce an identical neural connectivity signature. Used EV wholesale sales hit an all-time U.S. record in Q1 2026 as off-lease vehicles and rising fuel prices drove demand through used-car channels. Maine signed balcony solar into law, joining roughly half of U.S. states in a legislative wave removing barriers to household energy generation. Anthropic's run-rate revenue reached $30 billion, tripling in under a year.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-8-2026/
